description: Backend engineering and agentic AI: building scalable systems, APIs, and tooling that turn complex problems into workflows people can actually use.

projects.name: Backend systems & APIs
projects.description: Designed and built production backend systems in Java and Spring Boot—REST APIs, microservices, and data layers powering large-scale enterprise clients.
impact: Scalable APIs and microservices in production
Clear contracts and reliability for downstream teams
SQL and data modeling for performance and consistency

projects.name: AI-driven migration platform
projects.description: Led design and build of an agentic AI platform: tools on legacy systems, LLM-backed agents, and a natural-language interface so developers can run complex migration workflows via chat.
impact: Makes internal tooling accessible without deep domain docs
Faster analysis and execution through AI-assisted automation
